mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recommendations ( user_id, product_id, detection_id, rank_no, score, reason, recommendation_type ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{productId}, #{detectionId}, #{rankNo}, #{score}, #{reason}, #{recommendationType} )
mapper.select: SELECT r.recommendation_id AS recommendationId, p.product_id AS productId, p.title AS title, p.brand AS brand, p.category_name AS categoryName, p.price AS price, p.image_url AS imageUrl, p.review_count AS reviewCount, p.rating AS rating, r.rank_no AS rankNo, r.score AS score, r.reason AS reason, r.recommendation_type AS recommendationType, r.created_at AS createdAt FROM recommendations r INNER JOIN products p ON r.product_id = p.product_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND p.visible_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.rank_no ASC, r.recommendation_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT r.recommendation_id AS recommendationId, p.product_id AS productId, p.title AS title, p.brand AS brand, p.category_name AS categoryName, p.price AS price, p.image_url AS imageUrl, r.rank_no AS rankNo, r.score AS score, r.reason AS reason, r.recommendation_type AS recommendationType, r.created_at AS createdAt FROM recommendations r INNER JOIN products p ON r.product_id = p.product_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND p.visible_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.rank_no ASC, r.recommendation_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM recommendations r INNER JOIN products p ON r.product_id = p.product_id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND p.visible_yn = 'Y'

SELECT p.product_id AS productId, p.title AS title, p.brand AS brand, p.category_name AS categoryName, p.price AS price, p.image_url AS imageUrl, p.review_count AS reviewCount, p.rating AS rating, ( COALESCE(p.rating, 0) * 10 + COALESCE(p.review_count, 0) * 0.05 + CASE WHEN category_signal.category_name IS NOT NULL THEN category_signal.weight ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN brand_signal.brand IS NOT NULL THEN brand_signal.weight ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN wishlist_signal.category_id IS NOT NULL THEN 8 ELSE 0 END ) AS score, CASE WHEN category_signal.category_name IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('Recommended from your recent interest in ', p.category_name, '.') WHEN brand_signal.brand IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('Recommended from your recent interest in ', p.brand, '.') WHEN wishlist_signal.category_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Recommended from products similar to your wishlist.' ELSE 'Recommended from your activity and product popularity.' END AS reason FROM products p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ep.category_name, SUM( CASE ue.event_type WHEN 'PRODUCT_DETAIL_VIEW' THEN 3 WHEN 'PRODUCT_CLICK' THEN 5 WHEN 'WISHLIST_ADD' THEN 8 WHEN 'AFFILIATE_CLICK' THEN 10 ELSE 0 END ) AS weight FROM user_events ue INNER JOIN products ep ON ue.product_id = ep.product_id WHERE ue.user_id = #{userId} AND ue.event_type IN ('PRODUCT_DETAIL_VIEW', 'PRODUCT_CLICK', 'WISHLIST_ADD', 'AFFILIATE_CLICK') AND ep.category_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ep.category_name ) category_signal ON p.category_name = category_signal.category_name LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ep.brand, SUM( CASE ue.event_type WHEN 'PRODUCT_DETAIL_VIEW' THEN 3 WHEN 'PRODUCT_CLICK' THEN 5 WHEN 'WISHLIST_ADD' THEN 8 WHEN 'AFFILIATE_CLICK' THEN 10 ELSE 0 END ) AS weight FROM user_events ue INNER JOIN products ep ON ue.product_id = ep.product_id WHERE ue.user_id = #{userId} AND ue.event_type IN ('PRODUCT_DETAIL_VIEW', 'PRODUCT_CLICK', 'WISHLIST_ADD', 'AFFILIATE_CLICK') AND ep.brand IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ep.brand ) brand_signal ON p.brand = brand_signal.brand LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT wp.category_id FROM wishlists w INNER JOIN products wp ON w.product_id = wp.product_id WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} AND wp.category_id IS NOT NULL ) wishlist_signal ON p.category_id = wishlist_signal.category_id WHERE p.visible_yn = 'Y' AND ( category_signal.category_name IS NOT NULL OR brand_signal.brand IS NOT NULL OR wishlist_signal.category_id IS NOT NULL ) ORDER BY score DESC, p.review_count DESC, p.rating DESC, p.product_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT p.product_id AS productId, p.title AS title, p.brand AS brand, p.category_name AS categoryName, p.price AS price, p.image_url AS imageUrl, p.review_count AS reviewCount, p.rating AS rating, ( COALESCE(p.rating, 0) * 10 + COALESCE(p.review_count, 0) * 0.05 ) AS score, 'Recommended from popular products.' AS reason FROM products p WHERE p.visible_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY score DESC, p.review_count DESC, p.rating DESC, p.product_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT category_name AS keyword, SUM(score) AS totalScore FROM ( SELECT category_name, 10 AS score FROM user_preferences WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UNION ALL
SELECT COALESCE(ue.category_name, p.category_name) AS category_name, CASE WHEN ue.event_type = 'PRODUCT_CLICK' THEN 1 WHEN ue.event_type = 'PRODUCT_DETAIL_VIEW' THEN 2 WHEN ue.event_type = 'PRODUCT_SAVE' THEN 3 WHEN ue.event_type = 'PRODUCT_IGNORE' THEN -3 WHEN ue.event_type = 'WISHLIST_ADD' THEN 5 WHEN ue.event_type = 'WISHLIST_REMOVE' THEN -5 WHEN ue.event_type = 'AFFILIATE_CLICK' THEN 10 ELSE 0 END AS score FROM user_events ue LEFT JOIN products p ON ue.product_id = p.product_id WHERE ue.user_id = #{userId} AND ue.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND COALESCE(ue.category_name, p.category_name) IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT p.category_name, 5 AS score FROM wishlists w JOIN products p ON w.product_id = p.product_id WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} AND p.category_name IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT p.category_name, 10 AS score FROM affiliate_clicks ac JOIN products p ON ac.product_id = p.product_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.clicked_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND p.category_name IS NOT NULL ) AS combined_scores GROUP BY category_name ORDER BY totalScore DESC LIMIT #{limit}
